vibe: Calm, premium, magazine-style, outcome-focused. Emphasizes typography, negative space, and metrics over decorative UI elements.

rules.headings: Display font (Newsreader). Use italic variants selectively to emphasize specific words (e.g., 'Product *Manager*').
rules.captions: Always uppercase with slight letter spacing (tracking-widest).
rules.mixing: Mix serif headings with sans-serif body text to create editorial tension.

cards.style: Flat surface, no shadow, 1px solid border (#27272a). Minimal padding.
cards.hover: Subtle background lighten (surface_hover), border brightens to #3f3f46.

buttons.primary: bg-foreground text-background font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-border text-foreground px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-surface transition-colors

navigation.style: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/50 z-50

stat_block.style: Flex column. Large serif number + small uppercase sans-serif caption.

chatbot_widget.style: Floating bottom-right. Solid background, high contrast, subtle 1px border. Minimalist 'Ask me anything' trigger.

motion.hover_effects: Opacity shifts for text, subtle background shifts for surfaces. No aggressive scaling.
motion.scroll_reveal: Fade in and slight translate-y (10px) using framer-motion.

images.description: Evify Rider App and ERP UI
Dark abstract minimal texture for optional background overlay or footer section

sections_blueprint.hero: Huge serif text 'Manav Bhardwaj' with 'Global Product Manager' and '*AI-Native* Product Builder'. Minimalistic bottom stat strip showcasing outcomes (150K+ users, 0->1 fintech).
sections_blueprint.about: Editorial text block. Large sans-serif body text with highlighted metrics. Mentions 3.5+ years building B2B/B2C.
sections_blueprint.selected_work: Asymmetric bento/list layout. Each case study has 'Case Study 01' caption, a massive image with max-h-[600px] object-cover, and a side panel with problem/metrics.
sections_blueprint.ai_projects: Grid of 3 cards. Focus on AI mapping copilot, Groq equity analyzer. Sharp borders, technical typography.
sections_blueprint.experience: Minimalist list. Year on left (caption style), Role + Company on right, brief bullet points.
sections_blueprint.skills: Masonry or bento grid grouping skills by category (AI, Fintech, PM).
sections_blueprint.contact: Large footer section. 'Let's Connect' in massive serif. Links to Email, LinkedIn, Phone, plus simple minimal form.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Newsreader' (or 'EB Garamond') for display and 'Geist' for body from Google Fonts/next-fonts.
Strictly follow the dark monochrome palette. Do not introduce neon or saturated colors.
Implement a CSS noise overlay (opacity-5) on the body for texture to enhance the editorial print feel.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide for minimal stroke-based icons.
